LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TOTO INVESTMENTS, LLC AND UPLAND INVESTMENTS, LLC'S MOTION TO AMEND THE ANSWER IS GRANTED. THE STRONG POLICY IN FAVOR OF PERMITTING AMENDMENTS AND THE LACK OF PREJUDICE TO PLAINTIFF GIVEN THAT DISCOVERY IS STILL OPEN AND THERE IS NO TRIAL DATE ARE SUFFICIENT BASES TO GRANT THE MOTION. IF A SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS FILED AND THE PLAINTIFF BELIEVES THE NEED TO REDEPOSE ANY OF THESE 11 DEPONENTS, THE PARTIES SHALL IMMEDIATELY CONFER ON THAT ISSUE AND IF THEY DISAGREE, THEY COULD COME BACK ON ANOTHER MOTION. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

Ntc Of Mtn To Amend The Answer
Off Calendar Aug-28-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. NIGEL A. WHITEHEAD OF THE ERNST LAW GROUP, TEL. NO. (805) 541-0300 EXT. 15 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE;
ATTY. EDWARD J. RODZEWICH OF THE STRATMAN, PATTERSON & HUNTER LAW GROUP, TEL. NO.
(510) 457-3460 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS TOTO INVESTMENTS, LLC AND UPLAND INVESTMENTS, LLC'S Motion To Amend The Answer is Granted. The strong policy in favor of permitting amendments and the lack of prejudice to plaintiff given that discovery is still open and there is no trial date are sufficient bases to grant the motion. IF A SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS FILED AND THE PLAINTIFF BELIEVES THE NEED TO REDEPOSE ANY OF THESE 11 DEPONENTS, THE PARTIES SHALL IMMEDIATELY CONFER ON THAT ISSUE AND IF THEY DISAGREE, THEY COULD COME BACK ON ANOTHER MOTION. PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER AS TO FORM OF ORDER. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)
